TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tjavatjavang = Gaga mniq Pingtung Santimnsyang ka alang Tjavatjavang. 132 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 404 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 393 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 11 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan88%, Rukai3%, Bunun1%, Tayal1%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = tɟa*atɟa*aŋ = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ santimnsjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟa*atɟa*aŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, ɾukai*%, bunun*%, tajal*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Tjavatjavang = Gaga mniq Pingtung Santimnsyang ka alang Tjavatjavang. 132 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 404 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 393 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 11 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan88%, Rukai3%, Bunun1%, Tayal1%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = tɟa*atɟa*aŋ = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ santimnsjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟa*atɟa*aŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, ɾukai*%, bunun*%, tajal*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
